proposal.disclaimer: Please Note: This material is provided on an automated, as‑is and non‑binding basis and may contain errors or inaccuracies. Any disclosure, distribution, or reliance on this material is solely at your discretion and responsibility and must be strictly limited to parties who are duly authorized and legally entitled to receive it. Nothing herein shall be construed as creating any binding obligation, representation, or commitment on the part of Microsoft.
proposal.disclaimerFr: Le contenu ci-dessus tient compte des promotions en cours, le statut MAICPP du partenaire, les incitatifs commerciaux Microsoft, le prix courant de Microsoft, ainsi que sur les informations additionnelles concernant les marges de profit que vous avez fournies. Ce document est fourni à titre indicatif seulement et peut être modifié sans préavis. Veuillez revoir les calculs et les ajuster (au besoin) avant de les transmettre au client. Microsoft n’assume aucune responsabilité quant au contenu ou à l’exactitude des informations ou des affirmations figurant dans ce document, ni quant aux décisions prises sur la base de ces informations.
proposal.quebecDisclaimer: PUPP generates draft customer proposal materials in English only. Partners should not use these materials with their customers in the province of Quebec who have not previously consented to communications from the partner in English.
proposal.quebecDisclaimerFr: PUPP génère des supports de proposition client à l’état de projet, et ce uniquement en langue anglaise. Les partenaires ne doivent pas utiliser ces documents auprès de leurs clients situés dans la province de Québec qui n’ont pas préalablement consenti à recevoir des communications du partenaire en langue anglaise.

proposal.emailToPartnerSubtitle: E-mail to send proposal to partner
proposal.incentiveCalculationDisclaimer: Incentive calculations depend on the data sources uploaded. If only CLAS or ASPX data is available, the Growth Accelerator and Incremental Incentive cannot be calculated — the customer is treated as net-new. Upload your Partner Center Renewals data to get the full incentive calculation.
proposal.customerDataNotFound: Customer data not found. Please go back and try again.

auth.consentNotice: This application collects your name and email address (unless you login through SSO), as well as usage information (such as features accessed and login timestamps) to support the operation and improvement of Partner Uplift and Proposal Planning platform. Such data is used internally by Microsoft stakeholders only and is not shared externally, except with Microsoft vendors who assist Microsoft in hosting the Partner Uplift and Proposal Planning platform. By signing in, you acknowledge this data collection. For questions, please contact your program administrator.
auth.signInAgreement: By signing in your further agree that you will only use this application in connection with your role at Microsoft and will not access or use the application or any data you are provided with access to within the application for any other purpose. You further agree that you will not share outputs from within or generated by the application with external partners, distributors, or resellers.
auth.toolPurpose: The purpose of this tool is to provide non-binding recommendations, estimated pricing views, and proposed bills of materials for Microsoft solutions. The outputs are provided for evaluation and planning purposes only, may be based on assumptions and available program data, and do not constitute an offer, quote, commitment to transact, or any guarantee with respect to pricing, eligibility, incentives, margins, or availability.
auth.acknowledgeTerms: I acknowledge and agree to the above terms
auth.signInUsingWorkEmail: Sign-in using your work e-mail ID
auth.adminConsentNote: Please note you would need the consent of your organization's global admin to access this application as a Microsoft Partner
auth.consentReferences: This application is subject to Microsoft's <privacy></privacy> and <terms></terms>.
auth.consentReferencesDemo: This application is subject to Microsoft's <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, <dataPrivacy>Data Privacy Notice</dataPrivacy> and <terms>Terms of Use</terms>.
